_meta.source: The Muscle & Strength Pyramid: Training, 3rd Edition — Helms, Morgan, Valdez (2025)
_meta.structure: level → duration_min → { meta, variants: [A, B, C] }
_meta.rir_definition: Reps In Reserve — how many reps short of failure you stop

progression_system.beginner: Linear — add 2.5–5 kg when all sets hit the top of the rep range
progression_system.intermediate: Autoregulated double progression — accumulate reps to top of range across all sets, then increase load
progression_system.expert: Phasic mesocycle rotation — cycle heavy / moderate / light rep range blocks every 6–8 weeks; use specialization cycles for lagging groups

meta.progression: Linear — add 2.5–5 kg when all sets hit top of rep range
meta.deload_every: Every 8–12 weeks or when progress stalls for 2+ sessions
meta.notes: Compounds only. Prioritize form over load. Alternate A/B/C each week across sessions.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Brace your core before unracking. Descend until thighs are parallel. Drive knees out on the way up.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Retract and depress scapulae. Touch bar lightly to chest. Full lockout at top.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Hinge to ~45°. Pull bar to lower chest. Squeeze shoulder blades at top. No jerking.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.coaching_cue: Push hips back, not down. Feel stretch in hamstrings. Maintain neutral spine throughout.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Overhead Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Neutral grip or pronated. Press directly overhead. Don't flare elbows excessively.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.coaching_cue: Lean back slightly. Pull bar to upper chest. Drive elbows toward hips. Control the return.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Hold dumbbell or kettlebell at chest. Elbows between knees at bottom. Upright torso.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Lower DBs until upper arms are parallel to floor. Slight arch, feet flat. Press to full extension.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Sit tall. Pull handle to lower chest. Hold 1 sec at peak contraction. Controlled release.

meta.progression: Linear — add 2.5–5 kg when all sets hit top of rep range
meta.deload_every: Every 8–12 weeks or when progress stalls for 2+ sessions
meta.notes: Compounds first, accessories after. Rest slightly shorter on accessories. Alternate variants across sessions.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Brace hard before descent. Stay braced throughout. Drive through midfoot.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Control the descent. Pause briefly at chest. Explosive press. Don't bounce bar.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Consistent torso angle throughout set. Pull to belt, not chest.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.coaching_cue: Push hips back. Feel the hamstring stretch. Bar stays close to legs.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Lead with elbows, not wrists. Slight forward lean. Stop at shoulder height.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Supinate at top. No swinging. Lower fully before next rep.

exercises.name: Conventional Deadlift
exercises.coaching_cue: Bar over mid-foot. Push the floor away, don't pull the bar up. Lock hips and shoulders simultaneously.

exercises.name: Overhead Barbell Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Grip just outside shoulders. Press bar in slight arc around face. Squeeze glutes at lockout.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.coaching_cue: Slightly wider than shoulder grip. Full stretch at top. Pull to collarbone.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Feet shoulder-width, mid-platform. Knees track toes. Don't lock knees at top.

exercises.name: Tricep Rope Pushdown
exercises.coaching_cue: Elbows glued to sides. Spread rope at bottom. Full extension.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Full range of motion — stretch at bottom, full rise at top. Pause 1 sec at top.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Hold weight at sternum. Upright torso throughout. Pause briefly at bottom.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Bench at 30–45°. Retract scapulae. Lower to chest level. Press to near-lockout.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Tall posture. Drive elbows behind you. Squeeze rhomboids at end range.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust
exercises.coaching_cue: Upper back on bench. Chin tucked. Drive hips up until body is straight. Squeeze glutes hard at top.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.coaching_cue: Cable at head height. Pull to ears, not neck. Elbows high and wide.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Neutral grip (thumbs up). Keep upper arms stationary. Controlled lowering.

meta.progression: Linear — add 2.5–5 kg when all sets hit top of rep range
meta.deload_every: Every 8–10 weeks or when progress stalls for 2+ sessions
meta.notes: Full coverage each session. Compounds first, then isolation. Rep ranges vary by exercise category.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Brace core. Knees out. Drive through mid-foot.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Retract scapulae. Bar to lower chest. Explosive press.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Stable hinge position. Pull bar to belt. No torso rocking.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.coaching_cue: Bar drags down thighs. Stop at strong stretch. Don't round lower back.

exercises.name: Overhead Dumbbell Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Seated or standing. Full overhead extension. Don't lean back excessively.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.coaching_cue: Chest tall. Pull bar to collarbone. Control the return.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Supinate at top. Lower under control. No momentum.

exercises.name: Tricep Rope Pushdown
exercises.coaching_cue: Elbows fixed. Spread rope. Full extension.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Full ROM. Pause at top. Slow lowering.

exercises.name: Conventional Deadlift
exercises.coaching_cue: Set hips, brace, push floor. Don't rush the setup.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Incline Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Bench at 30–45°. Control descent. Scapulae retracted.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Up
exercises.coaching_cue: Full hang at bottom. Chest to bar. Avoid kipping.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Full depth. Feet shoulder-width. Don't let knees cave.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Lead with elbows. Stop at shoulder height. No shrugging.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust
exercises.coaching_cue: Chin tucked. Ribs down. Squeeze glutes at top.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Neutral grip. Slow, controlled movement.

exercises.name: Skull Crusher
exercises.coaching_cue: Elbows fixed. Extend fully.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Full stretch at bottom. Slow tempo. 2-sec pause at top.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Full depth. Knees track toes. Controlled descent.

exercises.name: Overhead Barbell Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Bar rests on front delts. Press directly overhead. Lock out at top.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.coaching_cue: Slight lean back. Pull elbows toward hips. Full arm extension at top.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.coaching_cue: Neutral spine. Hinge, don't squat. Feel the hamstring load.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Slow descent, explosive press. Keep shoulder blades together.

exercises.name: Cable Row (Close Grip)
exercises.coaching_cue: Neutral grip. Row to sternum. Elbows past torso.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.coaching_cue: High cable. Pull to nose level. External rotate at end range.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Elbows fixed. Fully extend at bottom. No swinging.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.coaching_cue: Pause 1 sec at full extension. Control the lowering phase.

meta.notes: Antagonist supersets allowed. Rotate rep ranges across mesocycles.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Keep scapulae pinched. Bar to lower chest.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Row to sternum. Hold contraction. Controlled release.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Brace hard. Break at hips and knees.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.coaching_cue: Hinge back. Feel stretch.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Lead elbows. Stop at shoulder level.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Supinate at top. Slow lowering.

meta.notes: Rep ranges vary within each session.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Heavy today. Stay tight.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Arch maintained. Touch and go.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.coaching_cue: Stretch fully. Pull elbows toward hips.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.coaching_cue: Push hips back. Feel the hamstring stretch.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Lead elbows. No trap involvement.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.coaching_cue: High cable. Pull to nose. Elbows high and wide.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Heaviest compound. Full focus.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Arched, tight. Touch chest.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Brace core at hinge. Pull to belt.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.coaching_cue: Neutral spine maintained. Deep hamstring stretch.

exercises.name: Overhead Barbell Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Lock out fully at top.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.coaching_cue: Pull elbows toward hips. Full stretch.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Higher rep finisher.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: Controlled arc. Elbows lead.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: No momentum.

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown
exercises.coaching_cue: Elbows pinned. Full extension.

meta.notes: Density via supersets. RIR drops to 0–1.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Max performance. Every rep counts.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Up
exercises.coaching_cue: Sternum to bar. Slow lower.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Last rep should be near limit.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Drive elbow to ceiling.

exercises.name: Giant Set Finisher
exercises.coaching_cue: No rest between exercises in giant set.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.coaching_cue: Heavy opener. Sit into the pocket.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Tight arch. Explosive intent.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Up
exercises.coaching_cue: 3-sec lowering.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.coaching_cue: Maximum hamstring stretch.

exercises.name: Overhead Barbell Press
exercises.coaching_cue: Strict. Lockout overhead.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.coaching_cue: Elbows past torso. Full stretch.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.coaching_cue: No momentum.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.coaching_cue: Full ROM. Slow eccentric.
